title: Traduora
description: Open-source translation management platform (TMS) for teams to collaboratively manage app localization, with a REST API, CLI, and import/export.
installation: Single all-in-one everco/ever-traduora image (API + web UI) on port 8080, backed by the bundled PostgreSQL add-on (TR_DB_TYPE=postgres; Traduora supports both MySQL and Postgres and we pick Postgres per convention). ROTATE before production: TR_SECRET (used to sign/verify auth tokens; generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`) and the Postgres add-on password. Database tables are created/migrated automatically on first boot. TR_SIGNUPS_ENABLED is left true so you can register the first account from the UI, which becomes the org owner; set it to false afterwards to lock down public signups. Set TR_VIRTUAL_HOST to the deployed host so URLs in invitation/password emails resolve correctly. Outbound email (TR_MAIL_*) and any S3 export targets are NOT provisioned here and must be configured separately if needed.
